WORK EXPERIENCE
University of Delaware | Research Assistant Aug 2024 - Present
• Built an end-to-end GAT/GATv2 imputation pipeline in PyTorch Geometric to reconstruct missing values in CMIP-style 
spatio-temporal data, including graph construction and training/inference workflow, which enabled accurate recovery of missing 
data and supported downstream climate analyses
• Designed evaluation across multiple missingness regimes (random/shared/ensemble masks), achieving CE 0.62 to 0.79 (+0.17) vs 
GCN/GraphConv and ~22% RMSE reduction on held-out regions

GCN/GraphConv and ~22% RMSE reduction on held-out regions
• Improved robustness by adding elevation + land/ocean features and seasonal normalization, maintaining performance under 30–70% 
missingness and reducing seed-to-seed variance by ~35%
Bank CenterCredit | Machine Learning Engineer Dec 2022 - Aug 2024
• Built and productionized credit scoring models across the lifecycle (origination & collections): origination Gini +10% / KPI +5%, 
collections Gini +15% / KPI +10%
• Automated end-to-end ML pipeline (data extraction, feature engineering, training/validation, monitoring) with Python, SQL, 
LightGBM, SHAP, and Airflow, reducing iteration time by 40–60% (about 10 business days to 4–6) and saving 6–10 hours per 
week
• Implemented data validation and anomaly detection checks to improve reliability, reducing recurring data quality incidents by

week

PROJECTS
AI Agent for Call Center
• Built a LangChain-based RAG assistant for call center staff to retrieve up-to-date information from internal databases and knowledge 
sources

Document Summarization
